name: WW-Three Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces drained canned red kidney beans (reserve liquid)
4 ounces drained small white beans (reserve liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 2-quart saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is softened, about 3 minutes.
3. Add zucchini and cook, stirring constantly, until tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in tomatoes, beans, 1 cup reserved liquid, and seasonings.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and let simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
Each serving provides: 2 protein exchanges; 1 1/8 vegetable exchanges; 1/2 fat exchange
Per Serving: 240 calories; 14 g protein; 4 g fat; 40 g carbohydrate; 444 mg sodium (estimated); 0 mg cholesterol
